scenarios.description: setScores prints rejection and leaves state unchanged when called with an odd-length array (length % 1 != 0) branch
scenarios.precondition: MiniMaxAlgorithm instantiated with default random scores and height
scenarios.expectedResult: original scores and height unchanged; prints "The number of scores must be a power of 2." once
pseudocode: int[] invalidScores = new int[5];  // 5 % 1 != 0 triggers the B0 true branch
assertTrue(outContent.toString().contains("The number of scores must be a power of 2."));
